about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
about.intro: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with expertise in modern web technologies. I love creating innovative solutions and turning ideas into reality through code.
about.experience: With years of experience in web development, I specialize in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. I'm always eager to learn new technologies and take on challenging projects.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about working with me

q1.question: What is your typical project timeline?
q1.answer: Project timelines vary based on complexity, but I typically deliver MVP within 2-4 weeks and full projects within 6-12 weeks.

q2.question: Do you work with international clients?
q2.answer: Yes, I work with clients worldwide. I'm comfortable with different time zones and communication preferences.

q3.question: What is your preferred communication method?
q3.answer: I prefer email for formal communication and Slack/Teams for ongoing project discussions. Video calls for important meetings.

q4.question: Do you provide ongoing maintenance?
q4.answer: Yes, I offer maintenance packages for ongoing support, updates, and bug fixes after project completion.
